title: mimulus ringens var. colpophilus
intro: Mimulus ringens var. colpophilus, also known as monkey flower, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow to orange flowers with a distinctive shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mimulus ringens var. colpophilus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
